item.title:
TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 9s This was a night of considerable significance.
For the first time, Arsenal
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 9s This was a night of considerable significance.
For the first time, Arsenal have reached consecutive Champions League semi-finals.
It was not particularly pretty but it was effective and they were recognisably Arsenal.
They must lean into that identity at the Etihad.
Mostrar más
